segments.text: His foundation is in the holy mountains.
The Lord loves the gates of Zion More than all the dwellings of Jacob.
Glorious things are spoken of you, O city of God!
I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon to those who know Me;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Behold, O Philistia and Tyre, with Ethiopia: 'This one was born there.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And of Zion it will be said,
This one and that one were born in her;
segments.speaker: The Most High

segments.text: And the Most High Himself shall establish her.
segments.speaker: The Most High

segments.text: The Lord will record, When He registers the peoples:
All my springs are in you.
segments.speaker: Singers and Players
